title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Yatra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Yatra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra:
Yatra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra!
